text: Amazing professor, had her for 8A and 8B, and her lectures were really helpful in learning the material!

Pretty much the best chem teacher I've had so far. The contents not too difficult but it can be daunting, but she explains things clearly and breaks everything down well so you never feel overwhelmed.

Anne Sizemore helped me so much in breaking down difficult concepts in Ochem. The only reason why I'm doing very well in a difficult class is because of her. Her tests were fair, and her explanations are very helpful. If you study consistently, you should be fine. If I could take her again for all of chemistry, I would. Best professor ever in UCSC!
Really good professor. Chem 8A is a hard course, but she made it so manageable. Really prepared me for Chem 8A later on.
She is so so amazing and smart and nice.

Professor Sizemore made organic chemistry enjoyable and even made it feel easier than gen chem courses. She is a great teacher and provides practice exams that are almost identical to the exams, making it difficult to fail if you study.

the goat of ochem. makes everything so easy to understand. she provides all the resources you need to succeed and she actually cares and wants you to do well. tests were super fair and the practice tests were similar to the real ones. my fav chem professor ive had so far at ucsc
Very nice lady. Lectures are chill. Homework is helpful. Provides helpful resources!

Anne Sizemore made me love chemistry. She deserves every 5/5 rating on here. Go to every single lecture if you want to succeed, and put in the time outside of class. Professor Sizemore makes it easy to succeed in her class if you put in the time and effort. The content comes at you fast, but Professor Sizemore makes it both digestible and fun.

Professor Sizemore deserves her 5/5 rating. Her class is so organized and the way she explains concepts is amazing. She made organic chemistry easy to understand and actually fun to learn. Also, if you study, her tests are relatively easy; there are no trick questions or weirdly worded problems. She's a great teacher and wants her students to pass.

Prof. Sizemore deserves all the praise for making a 'difficult & accelerated by 6 weeks' course extremely easy for anyone to succeed in as long as they try their best. I'll miss her while taking 8B. Exams are a huge portion of the grade but she releases old exams for practice so you will be extremely prepared! Actually do the hw and you'll be fine!

Professor Sizemore is hands down the best professor I've ever had. She does such a good job at making hard/scary concepts super easy to understand, and her tests are genuinely super straightforward. She also clearly states EXACTLY what she is going to put on her exams, so be sure to do the practice exams/problems because her tests are the same!

Professor Sizemore is probably the best STEM professor I ever had. She breaks down OCHEM into really simple parts that can be understood by just about anyone. I had her for both Chem 8A and 8B, and the material is hard. However, Sizemore makes it very clear what she expects for midterms and finals. Go to lecture and put some work outside of class.

I took Sizemore for Chem 8A and 8B, and I can undoubtedly say that she is one of my favorite professors I've ever had. She is so enthusiastic towards OChem and it's obvious that her main priority is her students' success.

Prof Sizemore is great, had her for both 8A and 8B. She explains and introduces concepts well. Theres no latework but you have plenty of time to do it. The quizzes are a little difficult because sometimes some topics are covered in a lot of detail so I struggled a bit with those. Overall tho shes great def recommend.

such a good professor, makes everything super easy to learn and doesn't try to trick you like some other profs do. she posts example midterms and finals that are very very similar to the ones you'll have to take.
Super nice and makes ochem easy to learn.
she is genuinely the best stem professor i've ever had and makes organic chemistry fun! her teaching is super interactive and explains every concept very clearly~
Makes organic chemistry fun and engaging! Always available to help and very kind towards students.

Absolutely loved this class, very nice structure and she cares about making sure her students learn the material. She is an amazing professor, if I ever get the chance to take one of her classes again, I absolutely would.

Her teaching style is understandable and easy to follow. Make sure to stay caught up in class. Her practice exams, homework, and discussion section worksheets reflect the exams. She made learning ochem less daunting than the course is known to be. Great Professor!

She explains content pretty understandably and is open to questions and reviewing hard content. Tests were appropriately hard and there were no surprises about what would be on it. Homework and quizzes aren't super difficult, but you definitely have to stay caught up. TA was really good too and weekly discussions were worth it.

Prof. Sizemore was a fantastic lecturer who made the material easy to understand. Her practice exams were almost identical to the midterms, and she provided lots of study material. I would 100% take this course with Prof. Sizemore if available.

Professor Sizemore made Organic Chemistry easy to understand, and her tests were great because she gives her past tests to study with and they are nearly the exact same. Her lectures are really great if you pay attention to them and follow along with the provided note template. Even if you can't make it to class, make sure to watch the lectures!

Professor Sizemore really makes the challenging topics of organic chemistry easy to understand. She is an amazing lecturer and her midterms are really fair, as long as you pay attention in lecture and put in some effort you will be fine.

She is amazing and teaches in a way that helps you understand the content more clearly. She is truly cares about your learning and makes organic chemistry so much easier to understand. Her exams are very much like the practices ones. Reading tthe textbook and actually doing the homework will help you on the exams.
Tests are similar to practice material given before hand. Doesn't throw many curveballs on tests.

My absolute favorite professor so far at UCSC. She made organic chemistry interesting and exciting, and her lectures were clear and easy to understand. She also set up the homework and discussion sections in a way that truly helps students learn while not being overly frustrating or difficult. She is well-organized and truly cares about students.

Dr. Sizemore is possibly hands down my favorite professor at UCSC. The lectures were amazing which motivated me to go and exams were extremely straightforward. The way she teaches is super effective and she held true to her word that "everyone can learn Ochem".

By far one of the best professors at UCSC. Organic chem is famous for being ridiculously challenging and she hade it seem like a breeze. She's incredibly kind, has tons of patience, and just overall really good at explaining really tough topics. So grateful I got to take the O chem series with her!

Prof Sizemore is possibly an actual angel. I don't know if she sacrificed a goat at the altar of the ochem gods or has some secret black magic, but she teaches one of the most infamously difficult classes at the university in a way that legitimately anyone could understand. I think I worship her.

I had the absolute pleasure of taking organic chemistry with Professor Sizemore, and I can confidently say that it was one of the most enjoyable and enriching academic experiences I've ever had. Professor Sizemore is not just an exceptional educator but also an incredibly kind and energetic individual.

Professor Sizemore is the best thing to happen in the world of organic chemistry. She explains everything so well and provides so much practice material for all your exams, it is difficult to do bad. I took o chem 1 like 1.5 years ago and I barely passed. I was able to get a B in Sizemore's class without being overly stressed. Highly recommend her!

Anne Sizemore is the silver lining. She is hands down the most caring and down-to-earth professor I've ever had the pleasure of meeting. Her class is smooth and as long as you care and put in the effort, you'll succeed. She teaches very conceptually which is extremely important. Try not to rely on memorization and instead **understand** the content

Prof Sizemore is a great professor, she is very helpful and the practice material she gives before exams is really helpful. Her tests can be difficult but are pretty straight forward if you have practiced. Her review videos are extremely helpful.

Easily the BEST professor I have ever had. If you struggle with ochem, take her, because her way of teaching is so easy to understand. She is kind and approachable and her class feels so rewarding. Pay attention in lecture, and go to her OH and you will easily pass. I wish waited to take ochem with her instead of other profs. Anne=Success!!!

The literal best teacher I've ever had in my life. Anne makes everything so straightforward for you to understand and has been the only class I've ever taken where I just watch her lecture recordings to study. Super kind, passionate, and puts in so much effort into making the class fun and us succeed. I LOVE OCHEM BECAUSE OF HER

Sizemore is an incredible professor! OChem is a difficult course, but she structures her class in a way that makes the subject easier to understand. I am retaking this course and it is truly a step up from the other 8B professor. She truly cares about her students.

Prof. Sizemore was amazing! She's so engaging, but she somehow manages to make organic chemistry pretty approachable, all things considered. I felt so good going into 8B with her after I finished 8A and that confidence was not for nothing. She really is a great professor and I'll be sad to leave her classes!
Anne is the best ochem teacher ever!!!! Her class is very straightforward and if you put in the work youll do well. It helps to rewatch the lectures and do all the worksheets.
Best lecturer I have had for my required classes. Just take her. She's incredible. Ochem is hard but she sets you up for success. THANK YOU ANNE SIZEMORE. I hope she reads these.

Best ochem teacher ever. If youre able to take her do it. Ochem is hard, but she does a great job breaking it down and has many example problems to help you through it. As a person who was scared taking ochem due to haveing poor gen chem teachers (geri) i as worried about not knowing a lot and she does a great job of helping and catching you up.

She is truly amazing. She is the best chem professor I have had, and take her instead of Lokey! She explains concepts so well and she is extremely understanding. She gives you objectives on what you need to know on every exam and sheer gives recap videos for each chapter. The final is cumulative, but she prepares you.

Ochem is a very tough subject, but she breaks down the information very well so that it is easy to understand. Attendance for lectures arent mandatory but they are for sections. She is very interactive and does lots of practice problems during class. Do the homeworks and midterm practice problems and you'll be fine for the tests.
The way professor Sizemore structures her class is very clear and builds your knowledge of mechanisms step by step. Great professor.

Sizemore teaches material very well making Ochem actually understandable but it is necessary because this class is really hard. No other teacher I have heard about is as comprehensive as Sizemore but even with this, if there is anything you dont understand, you will need to get clarification as every single topic is necessary.

Ochem is HARD. Like, I mean SUPER HARD. However, Professor Sizemore's active teaching style and approachability makes her an amazing professor. Always do your homework on time and read the textbook or else you will have an extremely hard time learning the material. Additionally, office hours was very helpful; take advantage of your resources!

If you've been through the chemistry series at UCSC this professor will be a breath of fresh air for you. The material is very difficult but because of amazing lectures, fair tests and homework/practice problems that prepare you for exams, you will learn a lot in this class. Her office hours are very helpful as well. 10/10

I was DREADING taking ochem. This teacher threw all of my fears out the window completely. The way she explains things just totally make sense. I didn't take the 1st midterm so the 2nd was worth 50%, but the 2nd midterm was very fair. I studied hard and got an 85, and i'm hoping the final will boost me two points to an A. Take this professor!!!
Prof. Sizemore's lectures are amazing, she tries her best to explain content even if it's fast-paced, ochem is difficult but taking it with her made it a lot more enjoyable!

As for Ochem teachers, Sizemore's class is a TREAT. She makes things very easy to understand and is very helpful in office hours/extra tutoring. She writes all of her own weekly section worksheets, so do those to understand what you'll be asked on the exams. She has plenty of resources and is a patient, caring professor. She made ochem SMOOOOTH

I can confidently say she's the light at the end of the tunnel. Her previous experience as a community college professor gives the perfect structure and teaching style. Active learning with lecture slides and multiple sources to help. Provides problem sets & worksheets with keys. They use an online program for homework, one assignment per week.
